description: A comment resource contains information about a single YouTube comment.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#comment.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the comment.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the comment.

textOriginal.description: The original text of the comment as it was initially posted.

textDisplay.description: The comment text as displayed to users.

authorDisplayName.description: The display name of the user who posted the comment.

authorProfileImageUrl.description: The URL for the avatar of the user who posted the comment.

authorChannelUrl.description: A link to the YouTube channel of the comment's author.

authorChannelId.description: An object that encapsulates information about the comment author's YouTube channel.

likeCount.description: The total number of likes that the comment has received.

viewerRating.description: The rating the viewer has given to this comment. Note that this property does not currently identify dislike ratings.

publishedAt.description: The date and time when the comment was originally published.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the comment was last updated.

videoId.description: The ID of the video the comment refers to.

parentId.description: The unique ID of the parent comment.

canRate.description: Indicates whether the current viewer can rate the comment.

title: Comment
